data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6. 1-3= The lid falls away and a corpse sits up. Roll on L3UN. If you survive, roll on SLT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: In the centre of this room is an iron gate and fence. Within is a smart looking stone tomb.
data.ENCOUNTER: The gate is locked (lock -1). Set into the side of the tomb is a hatch. Roll on SECT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space is rough and looks as if they were going to turn it into a tomb but it is empty.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is some shuffling. Roll a D6. 1-3= Face 2 HUGE SPIDERS. 4-6= Face a GIANT RAT.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a basin with a decorative spout shaped like a god. Roll on GOT1. It is full of water.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can make an offering to the god here and gain 1 FP if applied correctly, then roll on GET1.

data.DESCRIPTION: A selection of stone statues stand in a circle. One appears to have a hatch in the base.
data.ENCOUNTER: You may search it. Roll a D6. 1-2= The statue turns into a STONE MAIDEN. 3-6= Roll on SECT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: The room is lined with stone ledges on which are cremation urns and pots full of dead flowers.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you search the urns, roll on URL1 then roll D6. 1-3= One smashes alerting a patrol. Roll on L3P.

data.DESCRIPTION: In an alcove there is a statue of a young woman, hands raised, and roots wrapping her form.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can make an offering to Radacina here for 1 FP. Then roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: This room feels colder. A coffin stands to one side. A white ambiance creeps into the space.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must face a GHOST. If you survive, you can search the coffin. Roll on SLT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: This musty space is filled with wooden coffins. Some are smashed. All is silent.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can search them. Roll D6. 1-2= A ZOMBIE rises up 3-4= You find nothing 5-6= Roll on SLT1

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a large lavish Sarcophagus here, with ornate trimming. Clearly its owner was wealthy.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can push the lid. Inside is an undead that you must face roll on L3UN and then SLT2+2.

data.DESCRIPTION: In the centre of this room is glass case that displays a skeleton. On its finger is a ring.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you smash the glass roll on L3P as you have attracted a patrol. If you survive, roll on MR1.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space is full of yellow smoke. From within you hear a low moaning noise but can't see in.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight the MUMMY inside. Roll a D6. 1-2= The mummy does +4 damage on it first hit.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is some water dripping from the ceiling. The floor is wet and mushrooms have taken hold.
data.ENCOUNTER: You may pick one, but as you do roll D6. On a 1-4 you breath in poisonous spores -3 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a SKELETON WARRIOR in a cage here. Pressure plates litter the floor.
data.ENCOUNTER: Make a PC8(2) or you accidentally stand on one, the cage opens and you must fight the foe.

data.DESCRIPTION: Two long abandoned metal tables, covered in webs, stand before you. On one is a dried body.
data.ENCOUNTER: In its hand is a scroll. You may take it but as you do the body rises. Roll on L3UN and then SCT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: Three stone tombs have been smashed to pieces here. Chunks of stone litter the floor.
data.ENCOUNTER: You stumble through the room. Make a Precision check PC6(2) or lose 2 HP. Then roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Lines of headstones have been placed along the walls, stacked for storage. One is smashed.
data.ENCOUNTER: There are some boxes of stone here with some leather cord and well. Roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Standing in the centre of this room is a self-contained miniature temple of white granite.
data.ENCOUNTER: You look around the structure. Make a Precision check PC9(1). If you pass roll on SECT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: Four, creamy green jade pillars seem to support this dark and dusty space.
data.ENCOUNTER: As soon as you step in, a ZOMBIE looms from the shadows and attacks. Then roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: A long time ago, in this plain room, someone erected a grisly effigy to the god Maduva.
data.ENCOUNTER: You may make a correct offering to Maduva to gain 1 FP. Then roll on L2TR.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space has a series of metal poles sticking out of the walls. One suddenly thrusts at you.
data.ENCOUNTER: Make a Precision check PC8(1). If you fail you are caught lose D3 +1 HP. Then roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space is empty, the stone walls covered in dust. Piles of rubbish have gathered.
data.ENCOUNTER: Someone sits in the shadows. Roll a D6. 1-3= Fight a BANISHED 4-6 Fight an AMAUROTIC.

data.DESCRIPTION: This chamber is lined with alcoves in which appear to be urns with family name plaques.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you search them, roll on URL1 but then roll a D6. 1-3= A patrol turns up. Roll on L3P.

data.DESCRIPTION: The walls here are filled with skulls that are stacked up high. One blinks at you.
data.ENCOUNTER: An undead bursts free. Roll a D6. 1-2= A ZOMBIE, 3-5= A SKELETON WARRIOR, 6= An ASHEN FEXT.

data.DESCRIPTION: This gloomy space is full of long shadows cast by a two large central pillars and curving arches.
data.ENCOUNTER: Wandering out of the shadow comes a MUMMY. You must fight it. If you survive roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: From the ceiling and walls run many thick roots. They have pushed through and formed a circle.
data.ENCOUNTER: If applied correctly you can make an offering to Radacina for 1 FP into the root nest.

data.DESCRIPTION: In the centre is a large stone altar. On it is an old candle stick, below it a dried pool of blood.
data.ENCOUNTER: It is dedicated to a god, roll on GOT1. You can make a correct offering for 1 FP. Roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: This was once a tomb to a lost warrior whose statue now lies in pieces across the floor.
data.ENCOUNTER: You search the chamber but there is nothing more in this room. Roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: This dusty space is lined with what were once glossy tiles, that also run into a sunken bath.
data.ENCOUNTER: As you approach the bath it magically fills with water. If needed you can wash. Roll on SLT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: In the centre of this dark space is a stone font. Standing at it is a priest as if baptising a child.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is no child, this is a ZOMBIE priest, drawn to repeat their past actions. You must fight it.

data.DESCRIPTION: Stacked here is a grim pile of skeletons, that have been dumped in this temporary dirty space.
data.ENCOUNTER: As you approach one of the skeletons it shakes itself free. You must fight a SKELETON WARRIOR.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space was once beautiful and shows a large mosaic showing an underwater scene.
data.ENCOUNTER: Kneeling at a large chest is a TOMB RAIDER. They turn and draw their cutlass. Roll on CT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: This appears to be a place for storing slabs of stone. Six large examples lean against one wall.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is also a workbench with an old chisel and hammer and dusty wood chippings. Roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a bloody block of stone on a wooden platform. To one side is a mummified head.
data.ENCOUNTER: The head has golden teeth worth 3D6 GC. If you take them the head rises as a GHOST and attacks.

data.DESCRIPTION: The floor here has collapsed and created a pit. It's not deep but if you fall in it would hurt.
data.ENCOUNTER: There are some boxes of stone here with some leather cord as well. Roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a large stone table in this space with a large chest beneath it. But something is off.
data.ENCOUNTER: In this room is a trap, roll on L2TR and then if you survive roll on CT3.

L4HA_Rooms.title: Level 4 Rooms - Human Ancestry - The Haunted
L4HA_Rooms.notes: Roll 2D6 (D66) for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is an ornate stone sarcophagus in this space. The surface is covered in many runes.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6. 1-4= The lid falls away and a corpse sits up. Roll on L4UN. If you survive, roll on SLT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: In the centre of this room is a painted wooden fence. Within is a smart looking stone tomb.
data.ENCOUNTER: The gate is locked (lock +1). Set into the side of the tomb is a hatch. Roll on SECT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Part of the stone ceiling here has collapsed. The room is passable but looks precarious.
data.ENCOUNTER: To pass through this room roll a D6 and add your Discipline. On a 4 or lower, you slip. Lose 3 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a basin with a decorative spout shaped like a god. Roll on GOT1. It is full of water.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can make an offering to the god here and gain 1 FP if applied correctly, then roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: A large creature has been here and pushed over a stone sarcophagus and smashed a pillar.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can do a search. Roll D6. 1-3= A STONE MAIDEN bursts free. 4-6= Treasure! Roll on SLT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: The room is lined with stone ledges on which are cremation urns and pots full of dead flowers.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you search the urns, roll on URL2 then roll D6. 1-4= One smashes alerting a patrol. Roll on L4P.

data.DESCRIPTION: A foul smell hits you as you enter and you see a large white bear eating a rotting TOMB RAIDER.
data.ENCOUNTER: Fight the UNDEAD BEAR. After roll on BST2, BT2 and +2D6 GC as you search the TOMB RAIDER.

data.DESCRIPTION: This room feels freezing. A coffin stands to one side. A white ambiance creeps into the space.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must face a GHOST. If you survive, you can search the coffin. Roll on SLT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: This musty space is filled with wooden coffins. Some are smashed. All is silent.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can search them. Roll D6. 1-3= A FARAVIATA bursts free 4-6= Roll on SLT1 +1.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a mound of earth here and sticking out of if you see the carved face of an old woman.
data.ENCOUNTER: This is a sacred place to Grakada. You may apply 2 different offerings correctly, each for 1 FP.

data.DESCRIPTION: Large stones have been stacked forming an internal chamber with a gaping, dark entrance.
data.ENCOUNTER: An UNDER TROLL clambers free. You must fight it. If you survive, you find a chest inside. Roll on CT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space is full of black smoke. From within you hear a low moaning noise but can't see in.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight the MUMMY inside. Roll a D6. 1-4= The mummy does +4 damage on it first hit.

data.DESCRIPTION: The sarcophagus here is frozen solid, ice coating the stone tomb. Icicles hang from the ceiling.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can chip away at it. Inside a FARAVIATA waits. If you survive, then roll on SLT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a OFILIT in a cage here. Pressure plates litter the floor and are hard to avoid.
data.ENCOUNTER: Make a PC8(2) or you accidentally stand on one, the cage rises and you must fight the foe.

data.DESCRIPTION: A series of long chains hang from the ceiling. You will have to push through them to leave.
data.ENCOUNTER: A body hangs from one of the chains. You can loot it. If so, roll on BST1 -2. After roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Three stone tombs have been smashed to pieces here. Chunks of stone litter the floor.
data.ENCOUNTER: You stumble through the room. Make a Precision check PC6(2) or lose 3 HP. Then roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Lines of bound mummified bodies fill this space, as if a series of tombs have been emptied here.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you search the bodies, roll on BST1+2 but a patrol comes. Roll on L4P.

data.DESCRIPTION: Set to one side is a self-contained miniature temple of pink marble, with four pillars.
data.ENCOUNTER: You look around the structure. Make a Precision check PC9(1). If you pass roll on SECT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Four, slate pillars seem to support this dark and dusty space. Large slate tiles line the floor.
data.ENCOUNTER: As soon as you step in, a BANSHEE rushes from the shadows and attacks. Then roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: A long time ago, in this plain room, someone erected a grisly effigy to the god Murataynie.
data.ENCOUNTER: You may make a correct offering to Murataynie to gain 1 FP. Then roll on L2TR.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a blue aura here that fills the room with a mystical light. A statue stands in the centre.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can touch the statue. Roll a D6. 1-2= A GHOST emerges and attacks. 3-6= Heal 3 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: The ceiling has collapsed into this room, crushing a sarcophagus, with slabs of stone.
data.ENCOUNTER: If there are any exits, they are completely blocked, as if a dead end. You find nothing here.

data.DESCRIPTION: This chamber is lined with alcoves in which appear to be urns with noble name plaques.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you search them, roll on URL2 but then roll a D6. 1-4= A patrol turns up. Roll on L4P.

data.DESCRIPTION: Something bizarre has happened to this room. The stone walls appear warped and twisted.
data.ENCOUNTER: You feel there is magic here you can tap into. You may charge up 1 scroll allowing you to use it twice

data.DESCRIPTION: This gloomy space is full of long shadows cast by one large central pillar and curving arches.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is a burner here that could be used for a fire. After roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: The corner of this room is flooded and appears quite deep. An undead is floating in the water.
data.ENCOUNTER: Your presence stirs the creature. Roll on L4UN and face the undead climbing out of the pool.

data.DESCRIPTION: In the centre is a large metal altar. On it is an ancient symbol, below it some crushed petals.
data.ENCOUNTER: It is dedicated to a god, roll on GOT1. You can make a correct offering for 1 FP. Roll on IAUT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space is full of straw and branches, as if a matting, topped with animal bloody carcasses.
data.ENCOUNTER: A low growl alerts you and you turn to see a ZORDIAN Shade. If you survive, roll on CT4 +2.

data.DESCRIPTION: This is the tomb of an ancient warrior. Stone swords cross the front of a red sarcophagus.
data.ENCOUNTER: The lid slides open and up stands a warrior of fur, now a FARAVIATA. If you survive, roll on SLT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: A large stone cross is mounted on a standing sarcophagus, surrounded by spent candles.
data.ENCOUNTER: As you step closer a GHOST bursts from the tomb. You fight it. If you survive, roll on RATT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are three iron cells here. They are locked (lock -1). In each is a CT2 chest and an undead.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll on L4UN for each trapped undead. Each lock that you open you face that undead for the chest.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space was once beautiful and features a large mosaic showing an battle scene.
data.ENCOUNTER: Kneeling at a large chest is a TOMB RAIDER. They turn and draw their cutlass. Roll on CT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a large statue of a beast with many animal faces, twisted muscles and torn flesh.
data.ENCOUNTER: This is a sacred place to Murataynie. You may apply 2 different offerings correctly, each for 1 FP.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are words scratched all over the walls and as you look the words FEAR ME appear.
data.ENCOUNTER: A rock flies form the shadows. Roll a D6 and add your Discipline. On 4 or lower it hits. Lose 2 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: Long shadows are cast across this empty space. You hear a moaning in the distance.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is nothing here, but you fill a chill go down your spine.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a crumpled stone table here that has been broken in two. There is some fur upon it.
data.ENCOUNTER: In this room is a trap, roll on L2TR and then if you survive roll on CT4.

L3SR.title: L3SR - LEVEL 3 SMALL ROOMS (6 SQUARES OR SMALLER)
L3SR.notes: Roll 2D6 for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll. All exits are archways.
L3SR.flavorText: This space is too small to be a normal room but it is not a corridor. All exits are archways.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is nothing here but some crushed stone and rock.
This small space is full of webs, dust and not much else.
There is a stone shelf on the wall here. On it are the remains of a number of red candles.
In the centre here is an urn on a pedestal. If you search it roll on URL1. -2 and the roll on L3P as a patrol comes along.
Set into the wall here is an ornate shrine to a god. Roll on GOT1. You can make an offering and gain 1 FP if applied correctly.
The statue emits a high pitch noise. Roll a D6 and subtract your Discipline. 1-3= You are able to focus and smash it. 4-6= Your head pounds. Lose 03 HP and continue on.
One of the exits here, if any, is blocked by a stone slab. Randomly establish which one.
There is a lantern here hanging from a hook. There is oil in the lamp foot and it is removable, but a large item. It can be lit and thrown for 2D6 damage at the start of a combat.
There is an ancient skeleton here, slumped against the wall. It has been stripped of armour and loot. Only a tattered, hemp gambeson remains.
There is a basin set into the wall. As you approach it fills with water from a spout. It looks clean.
There is a golden idol worth 3D6 GC here on a plinth. You can try and swap it out with a bag of seed or sand. Make a precision check PC9(1). Failure sees a dart shoot from a hole. Lose D6 HP.

L4SR.title: L4SR - LEVEL 4 SMALL ROOMS (6 SQUARES OR SMALLER)
L4SR.notes: Roll 2D6 for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll. All exits are archways.
L4SR.flavorText: This space is too small to be a normal room but it is not a corridor. All exits are archways.

data.DESCRIPTION: The wall here has partially crumbled leaving a pile of rocks on the floor.
Floating next to the wall is a globe of water, that is held by a magical force. You look closer and probe it. You can drink, wash or gather water here.
There is a stone shelf on the wall here. On it are the remains of a number of red candles and a bowl of small animal bones.
In the centre here is an urn on a pedestal. If you search it roll on URL2 -2 and then roll on L4P as a patrol comes along.
Set into the wall here is an ornate shrine to a god. Roll on GOT1. You can make an offering and gain 1 FP if applied correctly.
The statue releases a cloud of gas as you approach. Roll a D6 and deduct your Shift. 1-3= You are able to dodge the cloud. 4-6= The gas engulfs your head. Lose D3 HP and continue on.
One of the exits here, if any, is blocked by a stone slab. Randomly establish which one.
There is a lantern here hanging from a hook. There is oil in the lamp foot and it is removable, but a large item. It can be lit and thrown for 2D6 damage at the start of a combat.
There is a metal box, with a coin slot, attached to the wall. The lock is old but strong (lock +2). If you manage to pick it, you find 2D6 SC and 5D6 GC.
There is a large stone key engraved into the wall here. This space has been lined with metal. All exits, if any, are metal doors. One is locked open.
There is a marble tablet on the wall here. It is carved with an ancient language you cannot read.

IAUT3.title: IAUT3 - INTERRUPTIONS AND THE UNEXPECTED TABLE 3

data.DESCRIPTION: Above you a series of ropes have been rigged up which support a small platform that hangs out of reach. You can just about make out a small Iron Chest. If you have a throwing axe you can throw it. Roll 2D6 and add your skill. 2-7= You lose the throwing axe. 8-12= You snag the rope and pull off CT3 +2.

There are large religious symbols painted on the walls here and they appear to have been used in a ritual, a pool of blood indicating a sacrifice. There are a few items in the blood. Roll a D6. 1= Just dotted blood. 2-3= Some splintered bone. 4= A gold ring worth 4D6 GC. 5-6= Some rare moss.

You glance up as the sound of rattling chains draws your attention. A network of linked chains snake across the room. Roll 2D6 and add your Precision. On 8 or below you are unable to avoid them and they slap against your body painfully. Lose 4 HP.

There appears to be an uneven stone in the wall here. You touch it and find it can be removed. Behind it is a leather wrapped package. You take it out and unwrap it. Roll a D6 to find out what is inside. 1-2= Some cheese and bread. Gain 1 Ration. 3-4= A necklace worth 5D6 GC. 5-6= A potion. Roll on POT3.

In the corner of this room is a free-standing wall. You see behind it a burn has been placed and it is lit. On a bench before it sits an OLDFANG PILLARIST who is toasting some meat on a stick. He turns and sees you and attacks. If you survive, roll on BT2 +2.

There is a workbench to one side here. You rummage through the drawers and find some random items. Roll on ART1, MIT1, ECT1 and HAOTI1. Roll 2D6 and add your Discipline. On a 9 or above you find a secret compartment, roll on SECT2. 8 or below and a patrol comes. Roll on L5P.

Over to one side is a rack that is full of scrolls. Standing at it is a figure. They turn as they hear you approach. It is a GREY ANCHORITE who appears to be sorting the scrolls. If you survive, you search the rack and find most are useless but there is one magic scroll. Roll on SCT2.

Thrown into a corner is a strange box. It has three compartments with seals carved in each: a feather, a hammer and a star. Add Winged Helmet Quest. If you place all these items in the box, they magically transform into a Gilded Winged Helmet worth twice as much as listed. One use only.

You pause as you hear the sound of chanting. It is coming from elsewhere in the dungeon and sends a shiver down your spine. To your left you see a tablet on the wall and realise the chant is coming from there. You look in and see the conduit plummets downwards into the dark.

To one side is a small black altar. On it are several red candles, all lit and giving off oil smoke. On the backboard is carved the god Inhuneric. You may make a correct offering at the altar and gain 1 FP. Then there are two items here. Roll on MIT1 and WIT2.

One of the corners is curtained off. You hear some scraping behind it before it is whipped back and an EFFLUX CREAR appears, wildly attacking. If you survive you see they had been working on some old weapons. One is a Throwing Dagger with Pohle's Rebound Rune engraved upon it.

You brace yourself as you hear a whoosh. To your left a large spear shoots from a hole in the stone wall. There is no time to move out of the way. If you have the Longsword you bring it up quickly and deflect the spear, otherwise you take 6 HP damage.

At the back in the shadows is a cage. Inside is a bedraggled young woman. The cage is locked (lock +2). She wakes as you approach and whispers for mercy. If you pick the lock liberate 1 prisoner, L1PR. If you return to this space to liberate the woman you find she is gone and you never see her again.

As you enter this space you see a white and ginger cat leap down from a ledge and run from the room. You go over and inspect what the cat was looking at and find a tipped over lidless jar with some dried chicken meat, but not enough to make a ration. Also roll on WIT2.

A quick short burst of wind alerts you to some movement to your right. You turn to see a screen of darts shooting towards you. If you have a shield of any type you quickly crouch behind it and take no damage. Otherwise, even if you have metal armour the darts hit the gaps and cause 4 HP damage.

A temporary ceremonial canopy has been setup here. From it hang beads and red thread. Below it, on the ground, are two leather cushions facing each other. As you move past it you knock a bell that was concealed in the canopy. Roll a D6. 1-4= A patrol is alerted and appear. Roll on L5P.

On the floor here are two, wide rimmed, brass bowls. Both are full of water. They appear to have been used for washing feet as there is a pair of sandals next to them. You step back as from the shadows steps a shoeless RAPTURED SHIMBAY. You must fight them.

The corner of this room has been changed into a workshop. A clay puppet lays on a table and a ball of string rests against the grisly toy. As you approach you are shocked to see the puppet rise and change into a red robed PUPPETEER, breaking the illusion. You must fight them.

Part of the wall here has crumbled to the ground forming a pile. Someone has begun repairing the damage with lime mortar and some of the fallen stone is stacked. There is a tea chest here you can search. If you do roll on TCT1 and then roll a D6. 1-2= Stones tumble down. Lose 2 HP.

There is a grating noise, and you look up to see a chunk of stone on a chain swinging towards you. If you have the Heavy Mace, you can bat it aside. Otherwise, you lose 6 HP as the stone bashes into you because it is too late to move.

There is a relief of Nevazator as a blind man carved into the wall here. He has his eyes gouged out, his mouth agape and hand outstretched. You can place a correct, small offering to Nevazator in his hand and gain 1 FP.

Some additional benches have been placed in the corner here. Two figures sit on them, arguing. Roll twice on L5WO -1. Because they are engaged, they do not notice you, giving you an extra attack. You see a stone vase to the right and throw it at them. One takes D6 +4 Damage, then you attack as normal.

After a search you find a hatch in the wall. Above it is a symbol. Roll on SST1. If you can place an item that is related to this symbol in the hatch it closes and opens again. In the place of the item is a random MQ gem. Roll on GMT1. This only works once.

You sense a magical echo here and fall back against the wall as a spectral procession of robe figures shimmers to life and marches through the space. You realise this is something that happened long ago, that they carry the body of an INFERNAL CARDINAL above their heads. Then it is gone.

On the wall here is a large marble slab stone. It is finely cut and detailed human skulls have been sculpted around the edges. Engraved into it is a strange language you cannot read. You may touch the stone once. Roll a D6. 1-3= You lose 2 HP. 4-6= You gain 4 HP.

There is a sliding noise and a stone panel opens and a log rockets out towards you. If you have the Greataxe you swing it and split the log down the middle making it drop away in two pieces. Otherwise, take D6 damage as it smashed into your torso.

You can see now that one of the exit doorways has a magical barrier in it instead of what is listed on the room description. Randomly determine which and change it on your map. If you pass through this barrier one large item you carry is destroyed. You choose. If you return this way the same happens.

You stare up mesmerised by a large mural of a swamp. You feel a surge of primordial knowledge and a vision of a dark swamp fills your mind. Add Swamp Vision Quest to your Character Sheet. If you face and defeat a BASAL INITIATE roll a D6. 1-3= You find on them a Scroll of Swamp Lung.

At the back of the room you hear a chain rattle and then a call for help. You find a man chained to the wall. There is a lock (lock +4) on the chain. If you pick it then liberate 1 prisoner, L1PR. If you fail you can not break the chain. If your return to this space all you find is a severed hand.

This room has a built in closet and inside on a bar hang three red robes. There are some sandals on the floor. The material is poor quality but good for bandages anything. You can search them. Roll a D6 if you do. 1-2= You pull your hand free and it is covered in red leeches. Lose 2 HP. 3-6= Roll on PT1.

You notice some chalk drawings on a wall. It shows the mechanism of a trap. Write Trap Quest on your Character Sheet. For the next trap you come across roll a D6. 1-3= You recognise this trap from the drawing and it has no affect, gain 300 XP. Cross off the quest whether successful or not.

There is a large glass case here. It is too large to carry and is locked (lock +3). Inside is a rune stone on a plinth. If you smash the glass a patrol comes. Roll on L5P. If you pick the lock, you open the case and roll on RUNE1.

Above you see a large pig's bladder stretched out just below the ceiling. It is catching drips from a leak and it is bulging full of water. You also spot the silhouette of a pouch in the water. If you have something sharp you can burst the bladder and grab the pouch but you become soaked. Roll on PT2.

There are 2 practice batons here. One is snapped and you grasp it. As you do so you receive a vision and see two people sparring. Add Brawler Quest. For the next VUDELIAN BRAWLER you face roll a D6. 1-4= You kick them hard in the leg where your vision showed they were injured, causing 2D6 Damage.

Once in the space you know that one of the exit doorways has a magical barrier in it instead of what is listed on the room description. Randomly determine which and change it on your map. If you pass through this barrier lose 2 HP. If you return this way the same happens.

Laying on a workbench, to one side, is a partially butchered dead deer. It appears as if its heart has been removed. But as you draw closer it springs up and you see its head is mutated and experimented on. Use ZOMBIE stats. It attacks. If you survive, you search the workbench. Roll on RATT1.

L5LR.title: L5LR - LEVEL 5 LARGE ROOMS (32 SQUARES OR LARGER)
L5LR.notes: Roll 2D6 for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll.
L5LR.flavorText: This space is larger than the average room being 32 squares or larger...

data.DESCRIPTION: This space seems more natural, with stalagmites and rubble. To one side is a chained UNDER TROLL. They swing into a rage and tear their chains from the wall. You must fight.
This space is lined with pillars and expansive murals fill the walls. If you have more than 4 FP for any god you feel inspired and gain another FP as a result.
This room has some armchairs in a corner and a large hemp rug. A RED GUARD rises from one of the chairs and attacks. If you survive, roll on CT3.
This space is lined with rough beds. An OLDFANG PILLARIST figure sees you and rises. They appear injured. -3 from their HP and fight.
Curtains separate this room into a number of spaces. Behind one is a metal table. On it lies two bodies. Their eyes flick open. Face 2 ZOMBIES. If you survive, roll on POT4.
At one end of the sanctorium two pillars frame an ornate altar. On it stands a gold chalice worth 4D6 GC. If you take it Roll a D6. 1-2= An alarm sounds. Roll on L5P.
This space is filled with some kind of smog and there are spikes in the floor. Pass a Precision check PC8(2) and you are caught by a spike. Lose D3 +1 HP. Roll on IAUT3.
Dominating this room is a finely detailed, spired temple. You may look inside. Roll a D6. 1-3= A SHADOW BLADE emerges. 4-6= You find a bag of 4D6 GC.
An aisle of statues runs down the centre of this room. Roll a D6 and add your Discipline. On a 5 or higher you spot a secret hatch in a base. Roll on SECT2.
Wide arches span a waterfall that cascades down a central channel. If you use the water. Roll a D6 and add your Discipline. 1-3= You fall in and become soaked.
There is a large gate of carved iron, blocking entry to a vault. The vault is locked (lock +6) and the key is hidden somewhere on this level. Roll on CT4 +2.

L6LR.title: L6LR - LEVEL 6 LARGE ROOMS (32 SQUARES OR LARGER)
L6LR.notes: Roll 2D6 for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll.
L6LR.flavorText: This space is larger than the average room being 32 squares or larger...

data.DESCRIPTION: Curtains line the walls. In the corner a tough old CONVERTED PRIEST mumbles at a cross. He sees you and advances, a dagger in his hand. Use BASAL INITIATE stats.
This space is lined with pillars and expansive murals fill the walls. If you have more than 4 FP for any god you feel inspired and gain another FP as a result.
This room has some armchairs in a corner and a large hemp rug. A RED GUARD rises from one of the chairs and attacks. If you survive, roll on CT3.
At the top of this pew lined space is an altar to a god. Roll on GOT1 and if you make the correct offering at the altar, you gain 1 FP.
Workbenches fill this space. There are 2 chisels, a bowl of water, plenty of stone and a few incomplete gargoyle heads. Roll on IAUT3.
Ropes are stretched across this room at head height. You have to duck to move through. You look up to spot 4 SHADOW BLADE. You must fight.
This space is filled with some kind of smog and there are spikes in the floor. Pass a Precision Check PC8(2) and you are caught by a spike. Lose D3 +1 HP. Roll on IAUT3.
This abandoned space has been vandalized. Chairs and altar have been smashed. In the rubble lies an injured Initiate. If you have bandages, he survives. L1PR.
Two ornate sarcophagi occupy this space. As you enter, the air turns dark and two ghosts rise from them. Fight 2 GHOSTS. After you find a chest. Roll on CT3 +2.
There is a large furnace burning in the centre of this room. Hung above the fire are 2 large vats. They are empty. There are pots and pans and a dirty stained pile of plates and a long bench.
A large statue of the Infernal Cardinal stands in the centre. 2 AFFLICTED kneel before it, holding their hands aloft. If you attack and defeat them, take their food. If you survive, roll on PT1.

L5HA_Rooms.title: Level 5 Rooms - Human Ancestry - The Infernal
L5HA_Rooms.notes: Roll 2D6 (D66) for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll.

data.DESCRIPTION: The space is lined with a black stone supported by dark pillars. Light doesn't penetrate the room.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6 and add your Discipline. On a 6 or lower the dark magic scolds your skin. Lose 4 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are hundreds of lit candles filling this empty space. Shadows flicker across the walls.
data.ENCOUNTER: The oily smoke that fills this space makes you feel drowsy. Lose 2 Discipline for the next 2 rooms.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a circle of blood painted on the centre of the floor. Inside are a series of lines and shapes.
data.ENCOUNTER: Above the hex is a caged BANSHEE. As you enter the cage drops and opens. Fight the BANSHEE.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are two rows of pews here facing a lectern standing on a platform, at the head of the room.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is a person cleaning the pews. Roll on L5WO. You must face them. If you survive roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are a number of desks and workbenches in this space. Symbols have been carved into them.
data.ENCOUNTER: Bent over one is a GREY ANCHORITE. You must fight. There are some items. Roll on WIT1, WIT2 and SCT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Lots of shelving in this space. On these are many dubious jars, holding small animals and organs.
data.ENCOUNTER: None of these specimens seem useful, but there are 3 usable jars with clear liquid. Roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: Set into the ground is a void. It is bottomless, the edges are in flux and it is pulling at you.
data.ENCOUNTER: It seems hungry. You can't resist. You must drop 1 large object into it, then it closes and you escape.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a tall glass case here. It has a door with a silver handle. Veins of silver run through the glass.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you enter roll a D6. 1-3= Heal 2D6 HP. 4-6= 1 piece of armour is enchanted, roll on ENAT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: Set into the ground in each corner, is a metal vat of stinking dark liquid. They are full of acid.
data.ENCOUNTER: You back away as 2 ZOMBIES emerge. You must fight them.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are two large iron cells here. In one is a scared looking man. His cell is locked (lock +2).
data.ENCOUNTER: If you pick the lock L1PR. Otherwise the prisoner's screams for help attract a patrol. Roll on L5P.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a series of bed sized ledges around the room. They appear hard and uncomfortable.
data.ENCOUNTER: A RED GUARD rises from a ledge. They have been sleeping and wear no armour, as they attack.

data.DESCRIPTION: To one side of this room is a workbench. On it is a pot of charcoal and a pouch of Kafbedo Spines.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6. 1-2= There is nobody here. 3-6= A GREY ANCHORITE is working here and turns and attacks.

data.DESCRIPTION: The air here appears to be vibrating. You cannot approach a pile of wavering stones in the centre.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you have a throwing weapon you may use it to disrupt the pile, otherwise lose 4 HP while in here.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are a number of beds behind curtains here. There is also a basin, full of water, in the corner.
data.ENCOUNTER: As you enter two figures appear from behind the curtains. Fight 2 AFFLICTED. After roll on RATT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is an altar here and a small statue standing on it. A collection of stools are gathered around.
data.ENCOUNTER: It is dedicated to a god, roll on GOT1. You can make a correct offering for 1 FP. Roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a stone frame on the wall here. Inside is a magical mass of suspended, churning earth.
data.ENCOUNTER: You may touch it. Roll a D6. 1-2= Lose any sand, or ash you carry. 3-6= Heal D6 HP. Roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: A small sunken pit lined with padded leather, shows signs of chalk. There are 2 wooden batons.
data.ENCOUNTER: Suddenly from behind you are pushed into the pit and must fight a VUDELIAN BRAWLER at -1 Shift.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a dome of glass in the middle of the room. It has an archway and 4 pillars are placed within.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is a figure meditating in the space. It is an EFFLUX CREAR. They jump up and attack.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are four pillars in this space. Vines grow around them and fill the space. The air is humid.
data.ENCOUNTER: A MORDEEL AXIOM slowly walks from the shadows. You must face this challenging foe.

data.DESCRIPTION: To one side is an effigy made of animal limbs, chains and strips of fur. The floor is slippery.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you go near the effigy, pass a Precision Check PC7(1) or slip over. Lose D3 HP. Roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: Standing in the centre of this empty space is a bloody tree stump. Near it is a tooth and gristle.
data.ENCOUNTER: You approach distracted by the grim sight in front of you and so do not notice the trap. Roll on L2TR.

data.DESCRIPTION: This room has been lined with bones. All are set into rock and cannot be removed. The air is warm.
data.ENCOUNTER: You spot a bone disc with three slots and pick it up. You may apply three identical gems. Roll on GCT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are four, lit, large black candles in tall iron candle sticks here. They give off a toxic aroma.
data.ENCOUNTER: Make a Precision Check PC8(1). If you fail, you're dazed by the smell and a patrol comes. Roll on L5P.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space is full of a dark mist of an unknown origin. It is damp as if water fills the air.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you pass through here you become soaked. If you come back through this space it has cleared up.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are some parchments on the floor here and some scorch marks. The walls are covered in slime.
data.ENCOUNTER: A bolt of slime shoots at you. Roll a D6 + Discipline Below 6 and it hits, melting a piece of armour.

data.DESCRIPTION: Gargoyles line the upper level of this room. There is a crest in the far corner. It is rock (lock +3).
data.ENCOUNTER: Two Gargoyles detach and attack. Use STONE MAIDEN stats. If you pick the lock roll on CT3 +3.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are seven stones carefully placed in a circle here. In the centre is a small rune stone.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you take the rune stone, blue bolts erupt from the stones and hit you. Lose 12 HP. Roll on RUNE2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Suspended from the ceiling are 2 skeletons. They are out of reach. A table covered in blood is here.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can see some of the bodies have scraps of cloth, leather straps and chains. Roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a small freestanding temple carved as if fire runs up its walls. Inside you can see a figure.
data.ENCOUNTER: Someone is praying. Roll a D6. 1-3= A BASAL INITIATE. 4-6= OLDFANG PILLARIST. You must fight.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a dark metal shrine here. It is formed into the shape of a great wave. On it is a metal tray.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can power up 1 Primordial scroll here. Place it on the tray. The scroll now does double damage.

data.DESCRIPTION: Towering over you is a beautiful shrine. A robed figure, knelt before it, is chanting. They attack.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight the MORDEEL AXIOM. If you survive, you find a golden goblet on the altar worth 6D6 GC.

data.DESCRIPTION: A square platform has been built into this space. Atop are two chairs and a table, with a red cloth.
data.ENCOUNTER: There are tea chests at the back. If you search roll on TCT1 x3 but a patrol comes. Roll on L5P.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a sculpture of a robed man here made of red marble. Blue flames flick across its surface.
data.ENCOUNTER: You look around the structure. Make a Precision check PC9(1). If you pass roll on SECT2. Lose 2 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are two finely sculpted sarcophagi in this room. They stand in the centre of the room.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can force them open. If you do, face two FARAVIATA and if you survive, roll on SLT2 x2.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a large circular brazier here. The embers in it are warm. It needs some kindling to relight it.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you light it roll a D6. 1-2= A patrol comes. 3-6= You find some dried meat and eat it. Gain 2 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: Set into the floor here is a bubbling pool that looks to be magically heated as you see no source.
data.ENCOUNTER: The water is boiling. If you have any vegetables, you may turn them into 1 ration. Then roll on IAUT3.

L6HA_Rooms.title: Level 6 Rooms - Human Ancestry - The Cultist Den
L6HA_Rooms.notes: Roll 2D6 (D66) for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll. EXITS column may include a NEXT_ROOM (Room Sequence link) — see tables_codex_rules.md for sequence rules.

data.DESCRIPTION: As you enter a vortex surrounds you and you feel the presence of the gods in this dark domain.
data.ENCOUNTER: They look to favour you. You may move 2 FP from one row to another row in your Favour Table.

data.DESCRIPTION: You stand at the edge of a dark Primordial pool. The floor is sunken and lined with black tiles.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is no escaping the water. You become soaked if you move forward. The pool continues through.

data.DESCRIPTION: You wade into this room and some poles are standing in the water. You see nets are attached.
data.ENCOUNTER: Make a Precision Check PC(10) to avoid the nets or release piranha's. Lose 4 HP while you kill them.

data.DESCRIPTION: Knelt down at a statue of a woman made of seaweed are two robed figures. They attack.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight a BASAL INITIATE and a MORDEEL AXIOM. If you survive, roll on CT4 +2 and RUNE1.

data.DESCRIPTION: Built into this room are four wooden pods that serve as sleeping compartments for the Order.
data.ENCOUNTER: As you approach, out of one pod stumbles a tired VUDELIAN BRAWLER (-1 Shift). You must fight.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a pedestal here, a RED GUARD standing atop as if waiting. They see you and jump down.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must face them. If you survive, you examine the pedestal and find a hatch. Roll on SECT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: A beam spans a spike filled pit. Cross this to reach an island upon which is a rune stone on a pedestal.
data.ENCOUNTER: Make a Precision Check PC10(2) or fall and take 2D6 damage. If you reach it, roll on RUNE2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Black flames seem to be burning a slate shrine. You see it is dedicated to Grakada.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can place a correct offering and gain a FP but it will burn your hands. If you do lose 5 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: This room is lined with coloured tiles and ornate wooden chairs. An alarm goes up as you enter.
data.ENCOUNTER: A massive fireball shoots towards you. You dive and avoid it, but crush 1 random large item. Roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: Set into the ground here is a trap door with bars. You look in to see 2 prisoners who beg for help.
data.ENCOUNTER: The padlock is prominent so you can smash it if you have a Heavy Mace or heavy item. L2PR.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are three tables and some chairs here. On one table is a knife and breadboard, but no bread.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6. 1-3= A patrol comes. Roll on L6P and it finds you here and attacks. If you survive, roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: Someone from the Order has painted the wall in blood, and into it marked symbols of the Murataynie.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can place a correct offering and form a symbol to gain a FP, but you will become bloodied.

data.DESCRIPTION: The floor of this space is completely covered in sand. There are broken sticks scattered around.
data.ENCOUNTER: Some sand is stained with blood. Make a successful Precision Check PC9(1) to avoid being bloodied.

data.DESCRIPTION: The sand continues. Above hang some thick ropes. You can reach one and see above it a tied up bag.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you climb roll a D6. 1-3= The bag bursts covering you in blood. Tick 4 Bloodied boxes. 4-6= Roll on BT2.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a huge brass gong here and 2 people are busy polishing it. They see you, shout and attack.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight a SHADOW BLADE and a VUDELIAN BRAWLER. If you survive, roll on CT3 +2 and RUNE2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Six highbacked, black, wooded chairs face each other in this shadowed council chamber.
data.ENCOUNTER: Suddenly a robed figure appears over each chair, but they shimmer and disappear. Roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are some wooden bins here all filled with broken tiles, stones, dried leaves or a range of soils.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you search you find a box containing 2 herbs roll on RST1 twice, but a patrol comes. Roll on L6P.

data.DESCRIPTION: As you enter you see a bound man on the floor, his body painted with runes, panic in his wide eyes.
data.ENCOUNTER: A BASAL INITIATE stands over him and seem to be chanting. They turn and attack. If you survive L1PR.

data.DESCRIPTION: Translucent flames lick up the wall surfaces of this empty space. The hot air probes your body and mind.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you have water in a flask it dries up. Roll a D6 for each potion you carry. On a 1-2= It dries up too.

data.DESCRIPTION: The flames still cover the walls here. In the centre is a giant orb of blue flame. Inside you see a chest.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can reach inside and pull the chest out. If you do, roll a D6. 1-3= You burn your hand lose 10 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: Magical flames surrounds this room. In the centre is a tall manikin. 2 people seem to be working on it.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight a PUPPETEER and an EFFLUX CREAR. If you survive, roll on CT3 +3 and RUNE1.

data.DESCRIPTION: The air is thick with an earthy smell. You see a statue that is warping from one creature to the next.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6. It settles as a 1-2= UNDER TROLL. 3-4= OFILIT. 5-6= ZORDIAN SHADE. You must fight.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are workbenches here upon which are some glass jars, stirring sticks and boxes of earth.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can examine further. Roll a D6. 1-4= Nothing. 5-6= You find some Malako leaves. Roll on RST1.

data.DESCRIPTION: A massive circle of swirling black cloud hangs in the centre of the room. Beneath it is a pool of blood.
data.ENCOUNTER: As you enter you feel a rush of cold air and a large red SUMMONED FLAYER appears. You must fight!

data.DESCRIPTION: The stone on the walls here is all warped and rippled. As you enter it flexes towards you ominously.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6 and add your Shift. On a 6 or higher you avoid being bashed. Otherwise take D6 damage.

data.DESCRIPTION: On a table is a warping object. You see it change every split second as if trapped in a loop.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can try to grab it. Roll a D6. 1-2= A knife. Lose 3 HP. 3-4= A stone. 5-6= A gold bar worth 3D6 GC.

data.DESCRIPTION: Within this space is a large mound of fluid rock. 2 figures seem to be controlling it with their minds.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight an AFFLICTED and RAPTURED SHIMBAY. If you survive, roll on CT4 and RUNE2.

data.DESCRIPTION: On a large table here is a map of Coradine. It is imprecise but is clearly used to plan raids.
data.ENCOUNTER: An OLDFANG PILLARIST is pouring over it with a steel tool but he then notices you and attacks.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a metal table here and on it a body. Their skin has been painted red; their teeth removed.
data.ENCOUNTER: Just being here drains you. There is a dark magic at work. Lose 2 HP now and 2 HP if you come back.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are two tables here. On one, there are 2 material sashes and a wooden cup full of red wine.
data.ENCOUNTER: Two GREY ANCHORITES are preparing the space. You must fight them both. If you survive, roll on RATT1.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are 6 lecterns here. On each is an open book. You do not understand the language.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you read on. Roll a D6 and add your Discipline. On a 6 or higher you find a scroll. Roll on SCT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space is full of desks and bookcases. There are scrolls, quills and lit candles everywhere.
data.ENCOUNTER: A robed SCHOLAR rises from a desk in disguise. Use MORDEEL AXIOM stats. If you survive, roll on SCT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: The walls have been lined with wooden panelling. Into this words and lines have been carved.
data.ENCOUNTER: It looks as if someone has been writing some crazy scripture, but you cannot read it. Roll on IAUT3.

data.DESCRIPTION: Four orbs float above a cloud of black fog. Lightning crackles from each hitting the fog.
data.ENCOUNTER: Arms raised an INFERNAL CARDINAL floats into sight. A bolt of energy hits you. Lose 5 HP and fight!

data.DESCRIPTION: There are 2 cells here connected by a tunnel. A wall comes down to separate the cells if needed.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is an old woman in the cell. It is locked (lock +3). If you free her she blesses you. Gain 8 HP. L1PR.

data.DESCRIPTION: Hanging here are at least 30 animal hides, blood covers the floor. They are too wet and heavy to take.
data.ENCOUNTER: You find a workbench upon which is a sharp knife and a bowl of water with a cloth. Roll on IAUT3.

L5SR.title: L5SR - LEVEL 5 SMALL ROOMS (6 SQUARES OR SMALLER)
L5SR.notes: Roll 2D6 for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll. All exits are archways.
L5SR.flavorText: This space is too small to be a normal room but it is not a corridor. All exits are archways.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a stone bench here upon which is a fur. This looks to be worth about 5D6 SC and is a large item.
The walls here are lined with scratches. They look like they have been left here by huge claws. Roll a D6. 1-2= There is a large severed paw on the floor.
This small space has been turned into a type of grotto. Shells line the walls and there is a lit candle set into one. It casts pink light around the room. There is a chest here. Roll on CT3 +1.
The walls here are lined with bones. As you enter a pendulum swings down and strikes them with a gong. Roll a D6. 1-3= A patrol comes. Roll on L5P.
In one corner of this space is a depression in the stone. It seems to have been left here and water is naturally gathering in it.
There is a small wooden box here. You can smash it open but lose 1 random FP. Inside you find 3D6 GC and 2 items. Roll on WIT1 and WIT2.
There is a carving of a god here. Roll on GOT1. If you have something flammable and it is the correct offering, you can use it and gain 1 FP.
On a pedestal here is a large book. It is too heavy to take but tucked in the pages is a scroll. Roll a D6. 1-3= It is unreadable, 4-6= It is a magic scroll. Roll on SCT2.
Painted on the wall here is a symbol used by the Infernal Order. You step closer but the paint is corrupted blood and slick. Roll on SST2.
You turn the corner and see a RED GUARD standing to attention in the space. He sees you and attacks. There is also a sack here. Roll on BST2 +2.
There are some jars on a shelf here. To one are some bottles and to another you find some Malako leaves that must have been left here by the patrolling guards to use.

L6SR.title: L6SR - LEVEL 6 SMALL ROOMS (6 SQUARES OR SMALLER)
L6SR.notes: Roll 2D6 for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll. OTU in this table means One Time Use; it can only be used once. MRA in this table means the concerned item is considered a Minor Religious Artifact. All exits are archways.
L6SR.flavorText: This space is too small to be a normal room but it is not a corridor. All exits are archways.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a stone bench here upon which is a fur. This looks to be worth about 5D6 SC and is a large item.
There is a single standing stone in this space. It is smooth from being touched. If you touch it and have 4 or more Grakada FP heal 4 HP. OTU. MRA.
There is a hanging femur here attached to a cord that runs to the ceiling. If you touch it and have 4 or more Maduva FP heal 4 HP. OTU. MRA.
Against the wall here is a stretched bear hide that appears worn. If you touch it and have 4 or more Grakada FP heal 4 HP. OTU. MRA.
This space is devoid of anything interesting. It is empty.
There is a small wooden box here. You can smash it open but lose 1 random FP. Inside you find two items. Roll on WIT1 and WIT2.
You walk into this space and immediately you see a bell above you start ringing, your presence triggering a magical alarm. Face a patrol. Roll on L6P.
There is floating orb here that seems to be full of swirling ink. If you touch it and have 4 or more Inhuneric FP gain 4 HP. OTU. MRA.
In a sealed jar here on a ledge are two eyeballs as if they are a relic. If you touch it and have 4 or more Nevazator FP gain 4 HP. OTU. MRA.
Roots appear to have pushed through the wall here. Some are smooth. If you touch it and have 4 or more Radacina FP gain 4 HP. OTU. MRA.
You turn the corner and see a RED GUARD standing to attention in the space. He sees you and attacks.

IAUT4.title: IAUT4 - INTERRUPTIONS AND THE UNEXPECTED TABLE 4

data.DESCRIPTION: There is an old, mangled chest here. It is open. You rummage through and find some random items. Roll on MIT1, ECT1 and WRT1. A lizard jumps out as you search. Roll a D6 and add your Shift. On a 5 or higher, you grab it and break its neck. Otherwise, you take 2 HP from the bite, then dispose of it.

To one side is a free-standing wall. You see behind it a table and on it a large cleaver. It rises as if in invisible hand and flies towards you. Roll 2D6. If it matches one of your armour dice sets then your armour deflects it and you take no damage. You can use your shift points. Otherwise lose 8 HP.

On the wall here is a wide brass gong. It is dented and split on one edge. It appears to be unfinished on the rear. Engraved to the back are some symbols. You can strike the gong once. If you do, roll a D6. 1-3= Two GHOSTS appear and attack. 4-6= The sound reverberates and heals 10 HP.

At the back in the shadows is a crumpled cage. Inside is a human corpse. You prise it apart and find a note on hemp on the body. If you have an incomplete people related quest from previous levels mark it complete for this is a note explaining their demise.

You sense a magical echo here and fall back against the wall as a spectral image of a large patrol appears. Beneath it is THE KEEPER and he is pushing three large SCUTTLE COWS through the magical doorway. You know they are destined for the surface. The image blinks and is gone.

You glance to your right and see a massive ethereal lion's head swoop down on you. Roll 2D6 and add your Discipline. On 8 or above you close your eyes and banish the spectral demon. Otherwise, fear runs down your spine and you feel its jaws rake your body. Lose 8 HP.

Under a blanket here are three iron cages serving as a vault or safe. Inside each is a chest. They are locked (lock +3). For each you open roll on CT3. If you open all three a patrol comes. Roll on the level patrol table.

You brace yourself as you hear a grinding noise. From above falls a large stone from a hole in the ceiling. There is no time to move out of the way. If you have the Heavy Mace, you bring it up quickly and deflect the block, otherwise you take 6 HP damage.

There is an amber glass case here. It glows orange. It is too large to carry and is locked (lock +3). Inside is a rune stone on a plinth. If you smash the amber a patrol comes. Roll on the level patrol table. If you pick the lock, you open the case and roll on RUNE2. There are beetles caught in the amber.

To one side is a small, shattered altar. On it are some broken pots. There is a small statue of Nevazator still in tacked embossed into the backboard. You may place a correct offering on the altar and gain 1 FP. Also, there is an item here. Roll on WRT1.

There is a makeshift grave here, where stones have been stacked on a dead adventurer. The body is ancient and mummified. You search it and find there are some ebony beads and a broken item. Roll on WRT1.

A canopy has been erected here. It is covered in dust and cobwebs. On it is the rough wooden carving of a beast. From it hang beads and red thread. As you move past it you knock a large bell that was concealed in the canopy. Roll a D6. 1-4= A patrol is alerted and appear. Roll on the level patrol table.

Part of the ceiling here has been forming a large pile. Behind the collapse there are 2 old tea chests you can search. If you do roll on TCT1 twice and then roll a D6. 1-3= Stones tumble down. Lose 6 HP. 4-5= Nothing further happens, 6= A VIBRALECT bursts free and attacks.

High above you is a large cage and in it are the remains of a dog. It wears a golden collar. The cage is supported by a rope. If you have a throwing axe you can throw it. Roll 2D6 and add your Skill. 2-9= You fail to cut the rope. 10-12= You cut the rope and savage the gold collar worth 5D6 +3 GC.

The corner of this room was once used as a stone workshop. A mound of stone has been chiselled and worked into blocks. Behind it covers a scrawny man. He begs for mercy. You can't image how he got this deep in. You point out the way to an exit shaft and he escapes. L1PR.

Hidden in cobwebs is a box. You see the symbol of an eye on one side. It is locked and you cannot break into it. Add Cyclops Box Quest. When in the presence of a CYCLOPS the box ticks. You can then use a round of combat to throw it at the CYCLOPS and cause 3D6 +5 damage, otherwise it stops.

You push your way through the cobwebs and see a wall mounted sculpture which shows the face of a Griffin. Its mouth is a gape. You hear a swishing sound when you approach and a stream of clear water pours from the mouth into a stone trough.

There is a swinging noise, and you look down to see a trapdoor open. If you have the Longsword, you jab it into the wooden wall of the pit, cling on, stop your fall and climb out. Otherwise, you lose 8 HP, fall 10 feet and then slowly climb out.

There is a relief of Inhuneric, a carving of a swirling black head, embossed on the wall here. The face seems to swim even though it is stone. This is a special shrine. If you can add an offering correctly gain 1 FP. If you make a second different offering correctly roll on L7BT.

On a ledge here is a strange box. It has three compartments with symbols carved in each: a claw, an eyeball and some fur. Add Metal Bracers Quest. If you place all these items in the box, they magically transform into a Fur Lined Metal Bracers worth three times as much as listed. One use only.

A roaring noise, and noise light to your left alerts you of the danger as a ball of flame rolls towards you from a hole in the wall. If you have a shield of any type you quickly crouch behind it and take no damage. Otherwise, the fire causes 2D6 damage.

After a search you find a hatch in the wall. Above it is a symbol. Roll on SST1. If you can place two different items that is related to this symbol in the hatch it closes and opens again. In the place of the item are 3 random MQ gems. Roll on GMT1 three times. This only works once.

Over to one side is a large round shield. It is damaged and useless, but as you lift it you see an arm attached to the back. It has been ripped from a poor warrior. Roll a D6. 1-3= There is nothing more here. 4-5= Around the wrist is a gold torque worth 6D6 GC. 6= A ring is on a finger. Roll on MR1.

You can see now that one of the exit doorways has a magical barrier in it instead of what is listed on the room description. Randomly determine which and change it on your map. If you pass through this barrier one potion you carry is destroyed. You choose. If you return this way the same happens.

You pause as a translucent image of four men holding taught chains magically appears. Between them is a massive Earth Croc, each chain is lashed to the beast as they try and control it. It is resisting. You feel as if you are there, can smell the sweat. Then the image is gone and you are alone.

Hanging down from the ceiling here is a cage, which is locked (lock +4). If you can pick the lock roll on CT4 +2. If you return here the chest is higher and out of reach. If you can climb on something you would be able to reach it.

There is a large painting of a Minotaur on the wall here. There is a dead goat on the floor before it and a soaked item is caught in the blood. Roll a D6. 1-3= It's a silver and gold dagger worth 5D6 GC. 4-5= 2 HQ Rubies. 6= Pole's Rebound Rune. If you take it, you become bloodied.

Strangely, this room seems to be a shroud of spectral mist. You stumble around feeling with your hands. Roll a D6. 1-2= You find an urn. Roll on URL2 +2. 3-4= You find nothing. 5-6= A GHOST drifts from the mist and attacks. You must fight it.

Some movement catches your attention and you see a white and ginger cat scamper from a hole in the wall and hurry out of the room. You can't catch it. You check the hole and find a dead black bird. There are a few black feathers caught up in the bloody remains.

From above you a tree trunk falls through a sliding hatch. If you have the Greataxe you swing it in a big arc and split the log in half making it drop away in two pieces. Otherwise, lose 8 HP as it smashed into your shoulder.

You stare up, mesmerised by a large fluxing statue of a Cyclops. You feel a surge of metamorphic knowledge and a vision of a collapsing chasm fills your mind. Add Chasm Vision Quest. If you face and defeat a CYCLOPS roll a D6. 1-3= You find on them a Scroll of Sunder.

At the back of the room you hear a chain rattle and then a call for help. You find a woman chained to the wall. There is a lock (lock +2) on the chain. If you can pick it then liberate 1 prisoner, L1PR. If you fail you cannot break the chain. If you return to this space all you find is a severed foot in a shackle.

It is clear now that one of the exit doorways has a magical barrier in it instead of what is listed on the room description. Randomly determine which and change it on your map. If you pass through this barrier one random scroll you carry is destroyed. If you return this way the same happens.

You notice some charcoal drawings on a wall. It shows the mechanism of a cage. Add Cage Quest. For the next locked cage you come across roll a D6. 1-3= You recognise this mechanism and you can open it without picking it, gain 400 XP. Cross off the quest whether successful or not.

Part of this room is sectioned off with an iron grill. Inside are some old pickaxes. This space hasn't been entered for decades. You try the door but it is rusted shut. Beyond you see a sack in the room. If you have a length of metal, your weapon does not count, you can prise it open. Roll on BT1.

You notice a pressure pad in one of the stones on the floor. If you decide to stand on it, roll D6. 1-2= A loud sound calls a patrol. Roll on the level patrol table. 3-4= An portcullises in the room opens. 5-6= Nothing happens, the mechanism must be broken.

L7BT.title: L7BT - BLESSED BY THE GODS TABLE
L7BT.notes: Roll 2D6 for this table. Make a note of the effect on your Character Sheet.
L7BT.flavorText: You feel energy surge through your body...

data.EFFECT: Some of the fear and anxiety of being deep in the dungeon lifts from your shoulders. You feel safer. The next trap you face misfires having no effect.
You glance down and see your weapon glowing. In the next combat you gain +2 damage when you hit your opponent.
A sense of déjà vu comes over you, as if you have been here before. When rolling for the next room you can choose, not including unique rooms.
Energy surges through your body and settles behind your eyes. When you face your next foe, lightning shoots from your eyes doing 20 damage.
You look down and see scales forming on your skin. In the next combat you -2 damage from any caused to you by your opponent.
A wave of soothing heat washes over you. Gain 4 HP (including beyond baseline) and if you have bloodied or soaked status, remove it.
A cool breeze washes over your skin and seems to have healing properties. Gain 10 HP (including beyond baseline).
You stumble backwards as an invisible force grabs your forehead and forces a thought into your brain. Next time you loot a chest +3 to the roll.
You feel as if your senses are more attuned, your head clear. In your next combat the enemy does not gain shift bonuses from the fatigue die.
Your arms become warm and tense. In the next combat you can cast two fireballs at your enemy at any time, each causing 2D6 +2 damage.
You feel invigorated and powerful all of a sudden. In the next combat when you take damage transfer it to your enemy as well.

L7LR.title: L7LR - LEVEL 7 LARGE ROOMS (32 SQUARES OR LARGER)
L7LR.notes: Roll 2D6 for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll.
L7LR.flavorText: This space is larger than the average room being 32 squares or larger...

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a large stone temple here to Murataynie. It reaches to the ceiling, and the air is rich with energy. If you apply a correct offering, you gain 1 FP and roll on L7BT.
This large space has two separate pens and each is lined with straw. Something ferrets in the gloom. Two dirty ASCUNDE emerge and attack.
There is a large blood stained table here. On the floor are piles of offal. To one side are some stretched hides and a cleavers. Roll on table IAUT4.
There is a large swirling portal up high here. You cannot reach it. Suddenly an EARTH CROC drops from the void. You must fight.
Around the walls are stone ledges. On these are a range of animals, all of which have had an autopsy. Roll on IAUT4.
Growing from the wall here are ten sets of glowing root chains. Attached to some are 3 Prisoners. You can spend 1 Radacine FP to L1PR.
A water filled glass cell stands here. Inside are large bobbing jelly fish. Roll a D6. 4 or below and you are hypnotised. A noise wakens you. Face a patrol. Roll on L7P.
There is a toxic cloud here. You can crawl beneath it if you have 5 or less large items otherwise take 5 HP damage.
A large skeleton of a SCALE HOUND is on display here. But as you enter your presence brings it to life. Fight it. The creature has +10 HP.
This room is shroud in darkness but you sense something breathing. All of a sudden two BROWN BEARS rush forward. You must fight.
Many beehives stand in this room. Roll a D6 and add your Discipline. On a 6 or lower the bees attack and you take 4 HP damage, otherwise you find some honey. Gain 2 Rations.

L8DS.title: L8DS - LEVEL 8 DESPERATE SEARCH
L8DS.notes: Roll 2D6. The D6 modified ranges rule applies. Any item is one time use unless stated otherwise.
L8DS.flavorText: You return to the next and desperately search...

data.DESCRIPTION: You scrape around and in the dust you find a fallen torch, next to a pile of ash.
You pull back a stone where the wall seems damp and find some dried fungi.
Caught up in the dust is a ripped piece of hemp.
In one corner are some lumps of charcoal.
Caught up in a large spider's web is a small black feather.
You come across some splinters of wood and a piece of metal.
There is a path to a bottle full of water.
Under a loose stone is a crashed skeleton of small mammal. You can salvage its fangs.
There is some glowing moss on the ceiling.
Tucked into a slot in the wall is a Throwing Knife +3.
Hidden under some stones is a fine Throwing Axe +4.

L8MO.title: L8MO - LEVEL 8 MAZE OBJECT
L8MO.notes: Roll 2D6. The D6 modified ranges rule applies. Any item you can find can be saved for inventory.
L8MO.flavorText: The passage was lead to something in the centre...

data.DESCRIPTION: You find nothing, the passages are empty.
You come to an empty plinth.
Standing on a plinth there is a vial of ink.
Hanging on the wall is a flag. Roll on BT1.
In the centre of the corridors is a glass dome, under which is a red rose.
On one wall is a sconce with a lit torch. Ash litters the floor.
Sitting on a shelf, on a small plinth, is a piece of silver jewellery worth 2D6 GC.
Hanging on a hook at the centre is a cloak and on it a piece of golden jewellery worth 3D6 GC.
There is a shrine here and next to it an old cabinet. Roll on RST1 +2.
There is a statue of a Minotaur here and around its neck is an amulet. Roll on MR1.
Mounted on a wall here is a gold embossed wooden box. Inside is a wand. Roll on MW1.

L8TR.title: L8TR - LEVEL 8 TRAP TABLE
L8TR.notes: Roll 2D6. The modified ranges rule applies. Any items you find can be taken and used for inventive usage.
L8TR.flavorText: There is a sound or a movement and...

data.DESCRIPTION: The stones seem to shift beneath your feet and thrust you upwards. Roll a D6 and add your shift. On a 6 or below you hurt your ankle. Lose 6 HP.
The wall to your right suddenly swings towards you. If you carry more than 5 large objects it catches you and causes 2D6 Damage.
A wave of magical energy pushes from the wall and hits you hard. There was no way to avoid it. Lose HP equal to double your Discipline.
A low mist fills the room for a minute and then evaporates. If you can't climb onto something to avoid it lose 4 HP as it stings your skin.
A trap door shifts and a spike trap flips up. Roll a D6 and add your Discipline. On a 7 or below you take 2D6 damage as it catches you.
The floor opens beneath you. Roll a D6 and add your Shift points. On a 7 you tumble in, failing to grip the edge, and lose 2D6 HP.
You hear a clicking noise. If there are any doors in this room, they are now locked with locks +2.
Portcullises slam down to shatter the doors and fill the doorways in this room.
Large spikes thrust up from the floor. Lose 4 HP. Roll a D6 and add your Shift Points. On a 7 or lower lose an extra 4 HP.
Magical gas quickly fills the air. A random potion you carry is neutralised becoming nothing but water.
The air becomes suddenly hot. Lose 4 HP. You also lose a random scroll as it bursts into flames.

L7HA_Rooms.title: Level 7 Rooms - Human Ancestry - The Menagerie
L7HA_Rooms.notes: Roll 2D6 (D66) for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll. EXITS column may include a NEXT_ROOM (Room Sequence link) — see tables_codex_rules.md for sequence rules.

data.DESCRIPTION: Standing tall is a statue of a beggar with a wrap around his eyes. He reaches out to the darkness.
data.ENCOUNTER: This is a sacred place. If you can apply 2 offerings correctly, gain 1 Nevazator FP and roll on L7BT.

data.DESCRIPTION: In the centre of the room is a large cage attached to a rope. Inside are 3 barking WAR HOUNDS.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6 and add your Precision. 6 or lower you trip a wire and the cage rises. You must fight.

data.DESCRIPTION: The ground here has been opened and partially eaten bodies, now rotten, have been thrown in.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you move through this room lose 2 HP for the smell is toxic and makes you sick.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space has an inbuilt tile lined pool that appears to be empty. There are words on the wall.
data.ENCOUNTER: On closer inspection the words have been crossed out. You can not read them. Roll on IAUT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: A number of slick cocoons cling to the ceiling here Puss covers the ground where some have burst.
data.ENCOUNTER: Make a PC8(2) or you slip and fall. Beneath the puss the stones are rough. Lose 8 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: The space stinks of meat. In the middle is a large carcass and on it feeds a MORTLEY FLY.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight the creature. If you survive, you search the room and find a chest. Roll on CT3 +1.

data.DESCRIPTION: To one side is a leather topped table, a chair and a chest. On a wall are some symbols and shapes.
data.ENCOUNTER: Behind the desk sits the PEN TAMER. They slam a fist down and attack. If you survive, roll on CT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is an inbuilt cell here. At the back is a chest, but in front of it is a large insect. It's unlocked.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can open it and fight the SCUTTLE COW. If you survive, roll on CT3 +2.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are some low pens here. When you look in and see they are full of harmless lizards.
data.ENCOUNTER: There is a table to one side with a chopping block and meat cleaver. Roll on IAUT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: Mounted on the walls here are a range of trophy heads of large animals. Heavy furs line the floor.
data.ENCOUNTER: The furs are too heavy to take. If you file off a set of horns a patrol comes. Roll on L7P.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space has been lined with earth. As you step through the space small creatures bite at you.
data.ENCOUNTER: Make a PC9 3 times. For every one you fail lose 3 HP as the small crocs manage to bite you.

data.DESCRIPTION: Set into a muddy floor devoid of stone, is a pool. As soon as you enter an EARTH CROC surfaces.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight the beast. If you survive, you search and find the body of a past victim. Roll on BST2 +2.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a large nest made of many intertwining roots. It is ancient and has a magical aura.
data.ENCOUNTER: This is a sacred place. If you can apply 2 offerings correctly, gain 1 Radacina FP and roll on L7BT.

data.DESCRIPTION: Large wooden boxes, full of animal feed, line one side of this room. On a shelf, out of reach, is a bag.
data.ENCOUNTER: If you can climb the wall you open the sack. Roll a D6. 1-2= A Potato 3-4= A Carrot 5-6= Nothing.

data.DESCRIPTION: This room has a central fire pit and some benches and beds, with furs, scattered around.
data.ENCOUNTER: A TERRA MAGNA rises from a seat and attacks. If you survive, you find a chest. Roll on CT2 +2.

data.DESCRIPTION: The corners of this room have been built into parrot cages. They squawk as you approach.
data.ENCOUNTER: Hanging on one wall are two plucked and roasted parrots. Gain 1 Ration. Then roll on IAUT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: This room is filled with all types of trash and a range of rotten old logs, none of which are useful.
data.ENCOUNTER: A smell grips you. Roll a D6 and add your Discipline. On a 5 or below you're overwhelmed. Lose 8 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: In the centre of this room is a large mound of rotten matter. From it bursts a huge VIBRALECT.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight this insect. If you survive, you search and find 2 pouches. Roll on PT3 and PT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: On a bench is a box full of bandages. They are too dirty to use but there is something more here.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6. You also find, 1-3= A Potion of Healing, 4-5= A Potion of Extra Healing. Then roll on IAUT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: In the centre of this room is a large termite mound to the side are ten jars on a wooden table.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can collect the termites, which are edible, in a jar. If you do, lose 2 HP. Roll on IAUT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: Cowering in the dark are 2 dirty looking figures. They see you and scream before attacking.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight the ASCUNDE. If you survive, roll on the Table IAUT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: This room appears empty. But as you step in an alarm sounds and stones begin to fall from above.
data.ENCOUNTER: Roll a D6 and add your Shift points. On a 6 or below you are slammed by a stone. Lose 8 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is an iron barred pen here. Inside you see a large SCUTTLE COW that is injured with -10 HP.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can fight the beast to get to a large chest at the back. If you survive, roll on CT4 +1.

data.DESCRIPTION: A corridor of sharp branches and spikes has been assembled here. They are hard to avoid.
data.ENCOUNTER: Make a PC9(2) or you get tagged and spiked as you try and slip through. Lose 8 HP.

data.DESCRIPTION: Floorboards have been laid here. Suddenly they rise up and a SCUTTLE COW bursts free.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight the insect. If you survive, you find beneath the boards a large sack. Roll on BT2 +2.

data.DESCRIPTION: Carcasses hang from the ceiling. The smell is intense. Someone stands at one, cutting meat.
data.ENCOUNTER: It is a VUDELIAN BRAWLER come for dry rations. You must fight. If you survive gain 1 Ration.

data.DESCRIPTION: In this space is a large inbuilt cage, door open. Inside is a bed of straw and animal faeces.
data.ENCOUNTER: You can search the straw. Roll a D6, add your Discipline. 7 or higher you find a Lock Pick +2(1).

data.DESCRIPTION: Piled high is a mound of bones. It is lashed with leather cord. Skulls top the creation.
data.ENCOUNTER: This is a sacred place. If you can apply 2 offerings correctly, gain 1 Maduva FP and roll on L7BT.

data.DESCRIPTION: There is a long table here. On it is a backpack, a length of rope, a knife, and some dry mushrooms.
data.ENCOUNTER: Two TERRA MAGNA are packing the bag. You must fight them. If you survive, roll on IAUT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space is full of animal hides. Reclining on this mound of furs is THE KEEPER. They rise slowly.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight this imposing enemy. If you survive, you find two chests. Roll on CT3 and CT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: This space has a table and chair to one side. On it are three thin metal probes and two bottles.
data.ENCOUNTER: The bottles contain water, and the tools seem to be for fine work. Roll on IAUT4.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are several empty cages here. Some hang precariously from the ceiling above you.
data.ENCOUNTER: As you enter, they begin to fall. Roll a D6. On a 5 or below one strikes you causing 5 damage.

data.DESCRIPTION: This room is littered with bones and dirt. In one corner a SCALE HOUND laps water from a barrel.
data.ENCOUNTER: You must fight the animal. If you survive, you find a concealed hatch. Roll on SECT2 +2.

data.DESCRIPTION: This room is lined with wire cages for small animals. In some are chickens. A few are dead.
data.ENCOUNTER: As soon as you enter the chickens begin to make a racket causing a patrol to come. Roll on L7P.

data.DESCRIPTION: There are two cages here. In one is a ravaged man with a large swelling at his throat. His eyes widen.
data.ENCOUNTER: The cage opens. Roll a D6. 1-4= L1PR, 5-6= As the man runs off his neck bulges and he explodes.

data.DESCRIPTION: Two MURIND sit cross legged on a raised stone platform in a deep chant until you enter.
data.ENCOUNTER: The skeletal figures jump down and attack. If you survive, roll on IAUT4.

L8HA_Rooms.title: Level 8 Rooms - Human Ancestry - The Monster Maze
L8HA_Rooms.notes: Roll 2D6 (D66) for this table. If you roll a unique room that already exists on this level then re-roll. Per Level 8 rules, deduct 2 from both dice (min 1). Room sequences end in boss creatures and can be fled — see tables_codex_rules.md.

data.DESCRIPTION: In this room is an old stone throne. It is covered in dust and cobwebs, a rusty sword leans against it.
